## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly performance update and content strategy discussion for RAMP's vendor pages and blog content.](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog pages saw overall improvement despite recent drops; per diem pages stable with increased .gov competition](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Vendor pages showing mixed performance across categories; AI pages performing exceptionally well](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [New "best tools for startups" content strategy discussed; URL structure and integration with existing pages to be finalized](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Victoria will be out of office next week; content creation to continue but publishing on hold for review](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Blog pages: Boost in performance over past 2-3 weeks, positions higher than two weeks ago](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Per diem pages: Stable, with increased .gov website competition in populous states](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [Expense category: Slight improvement over past three weeks](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Tuning pages: Performance consistent with previous week](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Treasury pages: Holding steady pattern](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Vendor pages:](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
      - [Slight overall increase](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
      - [Review and versus pages increased](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
      - [Alternative pages decreased](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
      - [Project management and DevOps saw biggest gains](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
      - [CRM and AI infrastructure experienced largest drops](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
      - [AI pages showing best performance, improved average position in top 10](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Content Strategy for New "Best Tools" Pages

  - [Template for "best CRM for startups" shared and approved](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Discussion on integration with current page hierarchy and UX:](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
      - [Proposal to add sections in existing pages linking to new content](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
      - [Consideration of separate submenu on main vendor landing page](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Agreement not to include in main navigation menu](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [URL structure to be determined; possible new subfolder for startup-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Victoria highlighted 3 categories to start with for new vendor content](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [Content creation to proceed without data section for now](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Plan to create 3-4 sample pages for review when Victoria returns](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)

### Internal Performance Tracking

  - [RAMP uses Looker dashboard to track metrics (user count, sessions, MQLs, SQLs)](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Current tracking is by individual page, not aggregated by page type](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Multi-touch attribution model integrated with Salesforce](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Vivek to propose folder structure for new "best tools" content by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
  - [Begin creating sample content for 3-4 new vendor pages (without publishing)](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
  - [Continue content creation for new vendor categories, excluding data section](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Victoria to review new content upon return from vacation](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Vivek to follow up on Slack with any urgent matters during Victoria's absence](https://fathom.video/share/tBoVx7Y3CBf5xG8iSks_Lccm9YxfzWhn?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
